items.summary: Update `frontend/src/components/settings/ConnectBotWizardModal.tsx` so `handleGenerateKeypair` no longer uses Web Crypto Ed25519 and instead generates the Ed25519 keypair using `@noble/ed25519` exactly as follows: `import * as ed from '@noble/ed25519'; const privateKey = ed.utils.randomPrivateKey(); const publicKey = await ed.getPublicKeyAsync(privateKey);`. Display the private key as a hex string (BOT_PRIVATE_KEY) and keep the public key as a `Uint8Array` for sending to the backend. If `@noble/ed25519` is not available at runtime/build-time, fall back to generating a 32-byte random seed and produce a placeholder derived public key, including the exact comment: `// TODO: Replace with real Ed25519 derivation in production.`. Do not change any other wizard UI steps, blur/copy behavior, warning text, or the existing `linkMutation` call flow.
